title: Costs
doc_html:
§5006.  Costs

In all such cases the defendant judge shall be condemned to pay the costs, if judgment be rendered against him; otherwise judgment for costs shall be rendered as provided in the rules of the Supreme Court.
doc_text:
§5006.  Costs
In all such cases the defendant judge shall be condemned to pay the costs, if judgment be rendered against him; otherwise judgment for costs shall be rendered as provided in the rules of the Supreme Court.
